creator: michael.hmich@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Adriaan de Groot from comment #1)
I see, sure I have, one example in which you can change the components as you wish as long as the panel is dark colored


Oxygen as global theme
application style doesn't matter
Plasma Style ANY
Colors Breeze, Breeze dark, probably any other as well
Windows decoration ANY
Fonts ANY

Plasma 5.22.5

Freebsd 13 kernel 13 Stable 

behavior is with the Chrome Icon and Oxygen Theme, seems that Chromium use its own ICON  and not any from the Icon set which is chosen, I tried several Breeze, Breeze dark, Oxygen and Oxygen dark, no change

once having set your desktop details and installed Chromium, just push the Chromium Icon on to the Panel and resize the panel hight to 34 or 32 to see it happen

thanks
